# hetzner_firewall (Resource)

Manages firewall rules for a Hetzner dedicated server. The entire firewall configuration is replaced on each update.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner_firewall" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
  status        = "active"
  allowlist_hos = true
  filter_ipv6   = false

  input = [{
    name       = "Allow SSH"
    ip_version = "ipv4"
    dst_port   = "22"
    protocol   = "tcp"
    action     = "accept"
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (String) Server number. Used as the unique identifier.
- `status` (String) Firewall status: `active` or `disabled`.

### Optional

- `allowlist_hos` (Boolean) Allow Hetzner services (rescue, DHCP, DNS, monitoring).
- `filter_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether firewall also filters IPv6 traffic.
- `input` (Attributes List) Incoming traffic rules. Maximum 10 rules. Applied in order. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input))
- `output` (Attributes List) Outgoing traffic rules. Maximum 10 rules. Applied in order. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--output))

### Read-Only

- `port` (String) Switch port: `main` or `kvm`.
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IP address.

<a id="nestedatt--input"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input`

Required:

- `action` (String) Action: `accept` or `discard`.

Optional:

- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version: `ipv4`, `ipv6`, or empty for both.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol: `tcp`, `udp`, `icmp`, etc.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.


<a id="nestedatt--output"></a>
### Nested Schema for `output`

Required:

- `action` (String) Action: `accept` or `discard`.

Optional:

- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version: `ipv4`, `ipv6`, or empty for both.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol: `tcp`, `udp`, `icmp`, etc.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.
